ItacAcademyItem.Name: Vari-Roma (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to this Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: L` innocenza protetta dal cielo, overo Sofronia, et Olindo. Oratorio del sig. Lodovico Antonio Mariani d`Orvito Accademico Vario. Posto in musica dal signor Pietro Antonio Cenammi romano (Roma, Campana, 1695); Triumphus Assumptae in coelum Virginis (Roma, Ferri, 1728). See Franchi 1994, pp. 121, 277.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
